message:
feat(ensemble): implement mechanical merger with grouping and conflict detection

Adds comprehensive mechanical pre-processing for synthesis:

Grouping algorithms:
- GroupFindingsByEvidence: clusters findings by file/line evidence pointer
- GroupRisksBySeverity: organizes risks by impact level
- GroupRecommendationsByAction: categorizes recommendations by action type

Conflict detection:
- DetectPotentialConflicts: identifies contradictory positions between modes
- Compares thesis statements, severity assessments, and recommendations
- Calculates conflict severity scores for prioritization

Pre-merge utilities:
- NormalizeFinding: standardizes finding format and confidence
- DeduplicateFindings: removes semantic duplicates across modes
- MergeOverlappingRisks: combines risks targeting the same issue

Includes comprehensive test coverage for all new functionality.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
